creator: supraexpress@globaleyes.net
text:
MACHTYPE=i386
MANPATH=/usr/share/man:/usr/local/man:/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.8/man:/usr/share/openssl/man
HANDBOOK=/usr/share/doc/handbook/
HOSTTYPE=FreeBSD
XAUTHORITY=/home/<user>/.Xauthority
VENDOR=intel
BLOCKSIZE=K
LOGNAME=<user>
HOST=<localhost>
EXINIT=set autoindent
WINDOWPATH=5
GNOME_DESKTOP_SESSION_ID=Default
GROUP=<user>
GTK_RC_FILES=/usr/local/etc/gtk/gtkrc:/home/<user>/.gtkrc-1.2-gnome2
OSTYPE=FreeBSD
PATH=/bin:/sbin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/local/sbin:.
TERM=xterm
PWD=/home/<user>
USER=<user>
WINDOWID=20971626
COLORTERM=gnome-terminal
DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=unix:path=/var/tmp/dbus-4nBC4hvLWx,guid=f0ea7bb1f1e098b77080830046bc3745
PRINTER=lp
DISPLAY=:0.0
SHELL=/bin/tcsh
GNOME_KEYRING_SOCKET=/var/tmp/keyring-Hmzrhw/socket
PAGER=more
DESKTOP=GNOME
SESSION_MANAGER=local/<localhost>:/tmp/.ICE-unix/1050
FTP_PASSIVE_MODE=YES
HOME=/home/<user>
MAIL=/var/mail/<user>
SHLVL=2
